title: Software Update - DFU is not available during a call
scenario: DFU is blocked with popup message when attempting to update firmware during an active call on Device Settings Software Update page
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Initiate or receive an active call on the connected device.
4. While on the active call, navigate to: Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
5. On the Software Update page, tap the "Update" button.
7. Tap "OK" on the popup to dismiss it.
expected: A popup appears with the message "Cannot update this device during a call". Tapping OK dismisses the popup and returns the user to the Software Update tab without starting the DFU.
